breakdown.source: Ministry of Science and Technology, Government of Bangladesh
Japan Society for the Promotion of Science
Bangladesh Council of Scientific and Industrial Research

cards.title: Ministry of Science and Technology, Government of Bangladesh
cards.description: Major national funding body supporting science and innovation research initiatives.

cards.title: Japan Society for the Promotion of Science
cards.description: Supports collaborative and advanced research programs through international cooperation.

cards.title: Bangladesh Council of Scientific and Industrial Research
cards.description: Promotes applied science and industrially relevant research outcomes.

cards.title: University Grants Commission of Bangladesh
cards.description: Provides academic research grants and institutional research support.

cards.title: UNICEF
cards.description: Contributes to social impact and public welfare oriented research initiatives.

cards.title: Trinity College, University of Oxford
cards.description: International academic collaboration partner supporting research and training.

cards.title: Trinity College Dublin
cards.description: Provides international collaboration opportunities in interdisciplinary research.

cards.title: RIKEN
cards.description: Supports advanced scientific partnership and high-impact research collaboration.

cards.title: Wuhan Textile University
cards.description: Academic partner supporting textile and material science oriented research.
